< MinionLoom > Command Console

Rich operational detail, reduced navigation friction. The fleet stays visible, the selected task stays anchored, and deep telemetry is available in tabs instead of forcing a long stacked page.

Dispatch

Dispatch a task, then work from the selected-task pane without losing the fleet view.
